svg.title: DYAD initialization points diagram
svg.desc: Shows the multiple initialization entry points in DYAD. The C GOTCHA wrapper and dyad_stream_core init(bool) both call dyad_ctx_init which calls dyad_init_env which calls dyad_init. dyad_stream_core init(dyad_params) calls dyad_init directly. pydyad calls either dyad_init or dyad_init_env.

g.text: shared by C GOTCHA and init(bool reinit)
